package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for validation_logic_duplicated_across_handlers: Repeated required-field or enum-validation blocks across multiple handler files.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule217NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule217NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule217NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario217Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule217NegativeService, input Rule217NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
